title: NPM Package Metadata Query for OpenClinXR TypeScript Stack
citation: NPM package metadata queried with npm view on 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: Current package version and license planning for the TypeScript/React stack.

As queried on 2026-05-03, react 19.2.5, three 0.184.0, @react-three/fiber 9.6.1, vitest 4.1.5, @gltf-transform/cli 4.3.0, @xyflow/react 12.10.2, and zustand 5.0.12 are MIT licensed.
As queried on 2026-05-03, @storybook/addon-vitest 10.3.6, @vitest/browser-playwright 4.1.5, and @vitest/coverage-v8 4.1.5 are MIT licensed.
As queried on 2026-05-03, @typescript/native-preview 7.0.0-dev.20260503.1 is Apache-2.0 licensed and exposes the `tsgo` binary.

As queried on 2026-05-03, @storybook/addon-mcp 0.6.0 is MIT licensed, describes itself as helping agents write and test UI stories, and peers on Storybook plus @storybook/addon-vitest.

claims_not_supported: That package APIs will remain stable without lockfile and upgrade policy.
That all transitive dependencies are license-compatible without automated license scanning.
